info.title: SlashMyBill CostAnalysis Action Group
info.description: Vendor-neutral cost analysis tools for the SlashMyBill Bedrock Agent. Provides cost breakdown, monthly trends, forecasting, and anomaly detection across all supported cloud providers.

post.summary: Get cost breakdown by service and daily trend
post.description: Returns cost breakdown by service category and daily cost trend for the specified date range. Works across all connected cloud providers.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address associated with the account

schema.description: The member email address associated with the account

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for the cost analysis period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

schema.description: Start date for the cost analysis period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for the cost analysis period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

schema.description: End date for the cost analysis period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

200.description: Cost breakdown response with service-level costs and daily trend

post.description: Returns monthly cost comparison across recent months showing service-level spend trends. Works across all connected cloud providers.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address associated with the account

schema.description: The member email address associated with the account

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for the trend period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

schema.description: Start date for the trend period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for the trend period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

schema.description: End date for the trend period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

200.description: Monthly trend response with per-month service-level costs

post.summary: Get cost forecast for upcoming period
post.description: Returns projected costs for the specified number of days ahead based on historical spending patterns. Works across all connected cloud providers.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address associated with the account

schema.description: The member email address associated with the account

parameters.name: forecastDays
parameters.description: Number of days to forecast ahead

schema.description: Number of days to forecast ahead

200.description: Cost forecast response with projected spend

post.summary: Detect cost anomalies and unexpected spending
post.description: Returns detected cost anomalies and unexpected spending spikes for the account. Works across all connected cloud providers.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address associated with the account

schema.description: The member email address associated with the account

200.description: Cost anomalies response with detected spending anomalies
